message:
Wire web/ to use capnwasm/vite-plugin for users.capnp codegen

The plugin lives at js/vite-plugin.mjs and emits .gen.mjs files next
to source schemas (or anywhere via outDir). Configured here to watch
web/users.capnp → web/src/playground/users.gen.mjs so editing the
schema during dev triggers regen + HMR.

The fixture script (scripts/generate-fixtures.mjs) imports the gen
file directly, so it has to exist before Vite starts. Added
`npm run codegen` (calls the same `capnwasm gen` CLI) to the prepare
step so the file is there for `dev`/`build`. The vite-plugin then
takes over for the hot-reload story.

The two paths (CLI in prepare + plugin during vite) emit byte-
identical output, so running both is harmless. Untracked the
generated files (added to .gitignore) since both paths regenerate
from users.capnp on every fresh checkout.

files.patch:
@@ -2,3 +2,8 @@ node_modules/
 dist/
 public/data/
 public/capnp.slim.wasm
+
+# Codegen artefacts — produced by `npm run codegen` (or the
+# capnwasm/vite-plugin). Source of truth is users.capnp.
+src/**/*.gen.mjs
+src/**/*.gen.d.ts

@@ -42,13 +42,17 @@ the handlers in `vite-rpc-server.mjs` into your own deployment.
 
 ## Wiring
 
-- `users.capnp` — the demo schema. `npm run prepare` regenerates
-  `src/playground/users.gen.mjs` if you edit it.
-- `scripts/generate-fixtures.mjs` — emits the static `.json`, `.cwb`, and
-  `.capnp` fixture files. Edit the `COUNTS` / avatar sizes here to change
-  the bench surface.
+- `users.capnp` — the demo schema. `npm run codegen` runs `npx
+  capnwasm gen users.capnp` to produce `src/playground/users.gen.mjs`,
+  and the `capnwasm/vite-plugin` plugin regenerates it on save during
+  dev. The generated file is gitignored.
+- `scripts/generate-fixtures.mjs` — emits the static `.json`, `.cwb`,
+  and `.capnp` fixture files. Edit the record counts / avatar sizes
+  here to change the bench surface.
 - `src/playground/main.ts` — runs all three protocols, measures
   `fetch` + `decode` + `render` per phase, picks the winner per row.
+- `vite-rpc-server.mjs` — the bench WebSocket server, attached to
+  Vite's HTTP server in both dev and preview.
 
 ## Honest about what this measures

@@ -3,7 +3,8 @@
   "private": true,
   "type": "module",
   "scripts": {
-    "prepare": "cp ../dist/capnp.slim.wasm public/ && node scripts/generate-fixtures.mjs",
+    "codegen": "node ../bin/capnwasm.mjs gen users.capnp -o src/playground/users.gen.mjs",
+    "prepare": "cp ../dist/capnp.slim.wasm public/ && npm run codegen && node scripts/generate-fixtures.mjs",
     "dev": "npm run prepare && vite",
     "build": "npm run prepare && vite build",
     "preview": "vite preview --port 4173",
